items.title: Istio
items.description: Istio is an open platform for connecting, managing, and securing microservices, making it easy to build secure and reliable cloud workloads, with or without sidecars. I have [localized the Istio mesh service documentation](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/istio_крига-скресла-після-тривалого-процесу-розгляду-activity-7260406545211940864-Q2Dz/) into Ukrainian, starting with version 1.24.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of Istio Service Mesh website in Ukrainian

items.title: Helm
items.description: Helm is a package manager for Kubernetes, enabling developers and operators to package, configure, and deploy applications on Kubernetes clusters easily. I made and maintain [Ukrainian localization of Helm documentation.](https://andygol-helm.netlify.app/uk/)
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of Helm website in Ukrainian

items.title: Kubernetes Documentation
items.description: Kubernetes, also known as K8s, is an open source system for automating deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. I made and maintain [Ukrainian localization of Kubernetes documentation.](https://andygol-k8s.netlify.app/uk/)
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of Kubernetes website in Ukrainian

items.title: ZSH for Google Cloud Shell
items.description:
For those who want more flexibility in Google Cloud Shell, this tool will allow you to get the zsh shell, with suggestions and auto-completion.

[ZSH for Google Cloud Shell](https://github.com/Andygol/gcloud-shell-zsh/)
items.alt: Screenshot of GitHub repository of ZSH in Google Cloud Shell

items.title: Welcome to OpenStreetMap
items.description: Modernization of the welcome mat of the OpenStreetMap project. [This revision](https://andygol.co.ua/welcome-mat-osmf/) is aimed at introducing multilingual support, simplifying search, and adding a toggle between day and night modes.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of Welcome Mat OpenStreetMap website in English

items.title: Switch2OSM
items.description: A multilingual version of the [Switch2OSM](https://andygol.co.ua/switch2osm-mkdocs/) project aimed at helping people get started using OSM data in their own projects. It uses Material for MkDocs for multilingual support, night and day modes, and search.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of Switch2OSM website

items.title: OpenStreetMap Ukraine
items.description: The [website of the Ukrainian community](https://openstreetmap.org.ua/) of the OpenStreetMap project, describing the goals and principles of the project, which also includes a map created by the community.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of the Ukrainian OpenStreetMap community website

items.title: OpenStreetMap
items.description: Ukrainian localization of the [OpenStreetMap project website](https://openstreetmap.org/).
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of OpenStreetMap website

items.title: OpenStreetMap Wiki
items.description: Creation of Ukrainian versions of the OpenStreetMap project [documentation](https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Uk:Адреси).
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of OpenStreetMap Wiki website

items.title: iD editor
items.description: Creation of a Ukrainian version of the [iD editor](https://ideditor-release.netlify.app/#background=Bing&disable_features=boundaries&id=w109981818&map=17.81/50.40238/30.68310&locale=uk) user interface, help, and walkthrough.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of the iD editor

items.title: JOSM
items.description: I spearheaded the development of the Ukrainian version of the [JOSM editor](https://josm.openstreetmap.de/wiki/Uk%3AWikiStart) user interface and accompanying documentation. I also provided guidance to maintainers on implementing improvements and adding new functionality to the editor, as well as creating plugins and [validation rules](https://josm.openstreetmap.de/wiki/Rules/UkrainePhoneNumbers).
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of the JOSM editor website

items.title: HOT Tasking Manager
items.description: The localization of the [Tasking Manager](https://tasks.hotosm.org/) user interface is a key aspect of the administration of projects undertaken by the Ukrainian OpenStreetMap (OSM) community.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of HOT Tasking Manager website

items.title: MapRoulette
items.description: The localization of the [MapRoulette](https://maproulette.org/) user interface and the administration of projects undertaken by the Ukrainian OpenStreetMap community. MapRoulette has dozens of mapping Challenges that are created by experienced mappers.
items.alt: Screenshot of main page of the MapRoulette website
